parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "UIExt : UIExtension" as UIExt
participant "mp : MacrosPanel" as mp
participant "sui : ScriptUI" as sui

User -> UIExt : select macro window
activate UIExt
create mp
UIExt -> mp : create(uic)
deactivate UIExt

User -> mp : Choose write a script
activate mp
create sui
mp -> sui : create(uic)
deactivate mp

@enduml
```
